sentences.text: 'Upon my word,' said the Miller, 'you are very lazy.
Really, considering that I am going to give you my wheelbarrow, I think you should work harder.
Idleness is a great sin, and I certainly don’t like any of my friends to be idle or sluggish.
You must not mind my speaking quite plainly to you.
